stemHtml: Following an emergency landing, the Commander of a flight should…

options.a: determine if an immediate evacuation is necessary or if the aircraft can safely taxi off the runway.
options.b: without delay safely taxi off the runway and ask for further assistance from Rescue and Fire Fighting Services.
options.c: command an immediate evacuation advising crew and passengers to use all available aircraft exits.
options.d: without delay safely taxi off the runway and then command an immediate evacuation.
